# Foyer

> Foyer is a voice sales agent for websites. It answers visitor questions using on-site content, navigates the page in real time, captures leads, and is installed with a single embed snippet.

## Primary URLs
- Homepage: https://tryfoyer.ai/
- App: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/
- Sign up: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/dashboard/signup
- Sign in: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/dashboard/signin

## Product Summary
- Voice sales agent for websites
- Real-time page navigation during conversations
- Lead capture and transcript logging
- Dashboard for agents, conversations, leads, and billing

## Pricing Summary
- Free: $0/month, 100 minutes, 1 agent
- Starter: $79/month, 800 minutes, 3 agents
- Growth: $299/month, 5,000 minutes, unlimited agents

## Installation
- Add the widget script from the app after creating an agent
- Supported on Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Framer, React, and plain HTML

## Contact
- Email: hello@foyer.ink
